name: How long does AI referral malpractice case take in Phoenix?

mainEntity.name: How long does AI referral malpractice case take in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1-3 years; aim to settle fast in AZ.
acceptedAnswer.description: 1-3 years typical; faster if settles. Arizona median ~18 months. Key factors: (1) Discovery speed; (2) Motions; (3) Trial rarity. Mediate early.
